risk_title: High Political and Governance Risk Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks are rated as High and persistent, creating an unstable environment for project implementation in Afghanistan. This directly impacts the ability to establish implementation arrangements and meet Ministry of Economy requirements.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance High High High

risk_title: High Macroeconomic Risk Impacting Project Viability
risk_summary: Macroeconomic risks are rated as High and persistent, affecting the operating environment for microfinance providers and enterprises in Afghanistan. This threatens the sustainability of finance supply and demand for micro and small enterprises.

Institutional capacity for implementation and sustainability has been upgraded from Substantial to High risk, indicating deteriorating capacity of implementing agencies (Aga-Khan Foundation Afghanistan and Afghan Credit Guarantee Foundation) to execute project activities effectively.
evidence_quote: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability Substantial Substantial High

risk_title: Sector Strategies and Policies Risk Escalating
risk_summary: Sector strategies and policies risk has escalated from Substantial to High, suggesting instability in the policy environment governing microfinance and enterprise development in Afghanistan, affecting project alignment and sustainability.
evidence_quote: Sector Strategies and Policies Substantial Substantial High
